productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Check Brown Skirts
description: CompositionBrown and black check skirt made of 55% polyester and 45% wool, has a 100% polyester lining, an overlapping front buttoned on the inside waist and buckled on the top, has a broad waistband and has pleatsFittingRegularWash careDry clean onlyThe party season is round the corner. So jet set and upgrade your wardrobe with this fab pleated skirt from united colors of benetton. Created with polyester-wool fabric, this skirt is designed to keep you warm, while the broad waist and pleats enhance your feminine look. Pair it with three-quarter leggings, a frilly top and mocassins or stilletto sandals.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in skirts Height: 5'9”, Waist: 26.5”, Hips: 37”
